title: Bombay High Court recalls order adjourning defamation suit for 20 years
description: The Bombay High Court on Wednesday recalled its order by which it had adjourned a 9-year-old defamation suit for 20 years [Tarinibahen Desai and Anr v. Kilkilraj Bhansali and Ors]The recall order was passed after lawyers in the case mentioned the matter on Wednesday and requested for changes to the earlier order.In an order passed on April 28, Justice Jitendra Jain had said that defamation suit was was an “ego fight” between two senior citizens and Court's time should be utilised to hear more pr
